Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Yunzheng Technology Co., Ltd..

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Yunzheng Technology Co., Ltd. presents a clear case of a Shanghai-originating IT and engineering firm relocating to the neighboring Zhejiang manufacturing belt to act as a system integrator. Originally named 'Yunzheng (Shanghai) Information Technology', its USCC (91310114) traces back to Jiading District, Shanghai. It has since relocated to the Economic and Technological Development Zone in Pinghu, Jiaxing. Despite an official industry classification of 'Power Transmission Equipment Manufacturing' and a dizzyingly broad business scope covering everything from cloud computing servers to solar equipment and mining machinery, its 5 insured employees and 8.49M RMB paid-in capital strongly indicate an asset-light operational model. The company likely functions as a B2B smart systems integrator, electrical engineering contractor, or a project bidding entity, rather than operating physical heavy machinery manufacturing lines.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 68)
Operational Status: RELOCATED / SYSTEM INTEGRATOR
